overall.description: A static first-person view inside a medieval tavern or inn rendered in a game engine. The scene features heavy wooden timber construction, a glowing fireplace, candle chandelier, and scattered furniture with warm ambient lighting. A single character stands near the fireplace in the background.

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary inside a warmly lit medieval tavern. Heavy wooden beams cross the ceiling above, while an iron chandelier hangs centrally. To the left, a dining table and chair sit near a large metal barrel in the foreground. A stone fireplace burns on the right side where a character stands in the background. The floor is wooden with a metal platter resting in the center foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, immersive perspective within a warmly lit medieval tavern, capturing the stillness of a rustic interior. It begins with a view of the wooden floor where a metal platter rests in the center foreground, grounding the viewer in the space. The gaze then expands to encompass the surrounding environment, taking in a dining table and a large metal barrel to the left beneath heavy wooden ceiling beams. As the eye drifts across the room, the scene settles on a glowing stone fireplace on the right where a lone character stands in the background. The composition is completed by the presence of a central iron chandelier that casts a soft, ambient glow over the entire timber-framed hall.
